title: centaurea fragilis
intro: Centaurea fragilis, also known as brittle cornflower, is a perennial plant in the Asteraceae family, characterized by its delicate blue or white flowers and brittle stem. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Centaurea fragilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of allergies and colds, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
